name: Linear
tagline: Linear SDK scripting skill for issue, project, team, cycle, and comment workflows
description: Bundles the `linear-sdk-scripting` skill, which guides agents through Linear work from the terminal by writing small Node scripts against the official `@linear/sdk`: reading, creating, updating, closing, and commenting on issues across teams, projects, and cycles.

env.name: LINEAR_API_KEY
env.description: Linear personal API key used when executing Linear actions.
